name: report_marriage_domestic_partnership
description: Reports a marriage or domestic partnership to update HR records, benefits, and payroll.

requiredFields.name: event_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Marriage/Partnership
requiredFields.description: The official date the marriage or domestic partnership occurred.

requiredFields.name: spouse_partner_first_name
requiredFields.label: Spouse/Partner First Name
requiredFields.description: The first name of your spouse or domestic partner.

requiredFields.name: spouse_partner_last_name
requiredFields.label: Spouse/Partner Last Name
requiredFields.description: The last name of your spouse or domestic partner.

requiredFields.name: spouse_partner_date_of_birth
requiredFields.label: Spouse/Partner Date of Birth
requiredFields.description: The date of birth for your spouse or domestic partner.

requiredFields.name: spouse_partner_ssn_last4
requiredFields.label: Spouse/Partner SSN (Last 4 digits)
requiredFields.description: The last four digits of your spouse's/partner's Social Security Number, required for benefit enrollment.

requiredFields.name: add_to_health_benefits
requiredFields.label: Add spouse/partner to health benefits?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to add your spouse/partner to your medical plan.

requiredFields.name: add_to_dental_vision
requiredFields.label: Add spouse/partner to dental/vision benefits?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to add your spouse/partner to your dental and vision plans.

requiredFields.name: update_life_insurance_beneficiary
requiredFields.label: Review/Update Life Insurance Beneficiary?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your life insurance beneficiaries.

requiredFields.name: update_retirement_beneficiary
requiredFields.label: Review/Update Retirement Plan Beneficiary?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your retirement plan beneficiaries.

requiredFields.name: update_w4_withholding
requiredFields.label: Review/Update W-4 Tax Withholding?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your W-4 tax withholding for federal and state taxes.

confirmationMessage: You are about to report a marriage/domestic partnership with event date {event_date} for {spouse_partner_first_name} {spouse_partner_last_name}. This will initiate updates to your HR records and benefits.
successMessage: Successfully reported marriage/domestic partnership. Your HR records and benefit eligibility are being updated. You will receive further instructions via email.

name: report_birth_adoption_of_child
description: Reports the birth or adoption of a child to add them to your benefits and update HR records.

requiredFields.name: event_type
requiredFields.label: Type of Event
requiredFields.description: Specify whether the event is a birth or an adoption.

requiredFields.name: event_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Birth/Adoption Placement
requiredFields.description: The official date of the child's birth or legal adoption placement.

requiredFields.name: child_first_name
requiredFields.label: Child's First Name
requiredFields.description: The first name of the child.

requiredFields.name: child_last_name
requiredFields.label: Child's Last Name
requiredFields.description: The last name of the child.

requiredFields.name: child_date_of_birth
requiredFields.label: Child's Date of Birth
requiredFields.description: The date of birth for the child.

requiredFields.name: child_ssn_last4
requiredFields.label: Child's SSN (Last 4 digits)
requiredFields.description: The last four digits of the child's Social Security Number, required for benefit enrollment.

requiredFields.name: add_to_health_benefits
requiredFields.label: Add child to health benefits?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to add your child to your medical plan.

requiredFields.name: add_to_dental_vision
requiredFields.label: Add child to dental/vision benefits?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to add your child to your dental and vision plans.

requiredFields.name: update_dependent_care_fsa
requiredFields.label: Review/Update Dependent Care FSA?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your Dependent Care Flexible Spending Account contributions.

requiredFields.name: new_dependent_care_fsa_amount
requiredFields.label: New Annual Dependent Care FSA Contribution
requiredFields.description: The new annual contribution amount for Dependent Care FSA. Must be between $0 and $5,000 ($2,500 if married filing separately). Required if update_dependent_care_fsa is true.

requiredFields.name: update_w4_withholding
requiredFields.label: Review/Update W-4 Tax Withholding?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your W-4 tax withholding for federal and state taxes, potentially due to child tax credits.

confirmationMessage: You are about to report the {event_type} of {child_first_name} {child_last_name} with event date {event_date}. This will initiate updates to your HR records and benefit eligibility.
successMessage: Successfully reported the {event_type} of your child. Your HR records and benefit eligibility are being updated. You will receive further instructions via email.

name: report_divorce_legal_separation
description: Reports a divorce or legal separation to remove ex-spouse from benefits and update beneficiaries.

requiredFields.name: event_date
requiredFields.label: Date of Divorce/Legal Separation
requiredFields.description: The official date of your final divorce decree or legal separation.

requiredFields.name: ex_spouse_first_name
requiredFields.label: Ex-Spouse First Name
requiredFields.description: The first name of your ex-spouse or legally separated partner.

requiredFields.name: ex_spouse_last_name
requiredFields.label: Ex-Spouse Last Name
requiredFields.description: The last name of your ex-spouse or legally separated partner.

requiredFields.name: update_life_insurance_beneficiary
requiredFields.label: Review/Update Life Insurance Beneficiary?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your life insurance beneficiaries. (Note: Ex-spouse must be removed from benefits).

requiredFields.name: update_retirement_beneficiary
requiredFields.label: Review/Update Retirement Plan Beneficiary?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review or update your retirement plan beneficiaries. (Note: Ex-spouse must be removed from benefits).

requiredFields.name: w4_withholding_review_needed
requiredFields.label: Review W-4 Tax Withholding?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you want to review your W-4 tax withholding due to a change in filing status.

confirmationMessage: You are about to report a divorce/legal separation with event date {event_date} involving {ex_spouse_first_name} {ex_spouse_last_name}. This will initiate updates to remove your ex-spouse from benefits and prompt beneficiary reviews.
successMessage: Successfully reported divorce/legal separation. Ex-spouse will be removed from benefits and COBRA information will be sent to them. Please review your beneficiaries.

name: update_employee_address
description: Updates your residential and mailing address in HR records, affecting tax withholding and available benefits.

requiredFields.name: effective_date
requiredFields.label: Effective Date of Address Change
requiredFields.description: The date your new address becomes effective.

requiredFields.name: street_address1
requiredFields.label: Street Address Line 1
requiredFields.description: Your new street address.

requiredFields.name: street_address2
requiredFields.label: Street Address Line 2 (Optional)
requiredFields.description: Apartment, unit, or suite number.

requiredFields.name: city
requiredFields.label: City
requiredFields.description: Your new city.

requiredFields.name: state
requiredFields.label: State
requiredFields.description: Your new state (e.g., CA, NY).

requiredFields.name: zip_code
requiredFields.label: Zip Code
requiredFields.description: Your new postal zip code.

confirmationMessage: You are about to update your address to {street_address1}, {city}, {state} {zip_code} effective {effective_date}. This may affect your tax withholding and benefit plan eligibility.
successMessage: Your address has been successfully updated. We will review if new state tax forms or benefit plan changes are required.

name: report_dependent_loss_of_coverage
description: Reports that a dependent has lost other health coverage, allowing them to be added to your company benefits.

requiredFields.name: dependent_first_name
requiredFields.label: Dependent's First Name
requiredFields.description: The first name of the dependent who lost coverage.

requiredFields.name: dependent_last_name
requiredFields.label: Dependent's Last Name
requiredFields.description: The last name of the dependent who lost coverage.

requiredFields.name: date_of_loss_of_coverage
requiredFields.label: Date Coverage Was Lost
requiredFields.description: The exact date the dependent's previous coverage ended.

requiredFields.name: reason_for_loss
requiredFields.label: Reason for Loss of Coverage
requiredFields.description: The reason the dependent lost their other health coverage.

requiredFields.name: add_to_health_benefits
requiredFields.label: Add dependent to health benefits?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to add this dependent to your medical plan.

requiredFields.name: add_to_dental_vision
requiredFields.label: Add dependent to dental/vision benefits?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to add this dependent to your dental and vision plans.

requiredFields.name: proof_of_loss_uploaded
requiredFields.label: Proof of Loss of Coverage Provided?
requiredFields.description: Confirm that documentation proving loss of prior coverage has been or will be uploaded.

confirmationMessage: You are about to report loss of other coverage for {dependent_first_name} {dependent_last_name} effective {date_of_loss_of_coverage}. This will initiate adding them to your benefits.
successMessage: Successfully reported dependent loss of coverage. Your dependent is being added to your benefits. You will receive confirmation and next steps via email.

name: update_beneficiary_designations
description: Updates primary and contingent beneficiaries for your life insurance and retirement accounts.

requiredFields.name: account_type
requiredFields.label: Account Type to Update
requiredFields.description: Select whether you are updating beneficiaries for life insurance, retirement plans, or both.

requiredFields.name: primary_beneficiary_first_name
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary First Name
requiredFields.description: The first name of your primary beneficiary.

requiredFields.name: primary_beneficiary_last_name
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary Last Name
requiredFields.description: The last name of your primary beneficiary.

requiredFields.name: primary_beneficiary_relationship
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary Relationship
requiredFields.description: Your relationship to the primary beneficiary (e.g., Spouse, Child, Sibling, Friend).

requiredFields.name: primary_beneficiary_percentage
requiredFields.label: Primary Beneficiary Percentage
requiredFields.description: The percentage of the benefit/account balance designated for the primary beneficiary (0-100).

requiredFields.name: has_contingent_beneficiary
requiredFields.label: Add Contingent Beneficiary?
requiredFields.description: Indicate if you wish to designate a contingent beneficiary (who receives benefits if the primary beneficiary cannot).

requiredFields.name: contingent_beneficiary_first_name
requiredFields.label: Contingent Beneficiary First Name
requiredFields.description: The first name of your contingent beneficiary.

requiredFields.name: contingent_beneficiary_last_name
requiredFields.label: Contingent Beneficiary Last Name
requiredFields.description: The last name of your contingent beneficiary.

requiredFields.name: contingent_beneficiary_relationship
requiredFields.label: Contingent Beneficiary Relationship
requiredFields.description: Your relationship to the contingent beneficiary.

requiredFields.name: contingent_beneficiary_percentage
requiredFields.label: Contingent Beneficiary Percentage
requiredFields.description: The percentage of the benefit/account balance designated for the contingent beneficiary (0-100).

confirmationMessage: You are about to update your beneficiary designations for {account_type}. Primary beneficiary will be {primary_beneficiary_first_name} {primary_beneficiary_last_name} ({primary_beneficiary_relationship}) with {primary_beneficiary_percentage}%.
successMessage: Your beneficiary designations have been successfully updated. A confirmation will be sent to your email. If updating a retirement plan and your spouse is not the primary beneficiary, spousal consent may be required.
